notes: Small focused bridge file (119 lines, 7 decls, no sorries, no maxHeartbeats overrides) specializing abstract AlgHom.pullbackKaehler to elliptic curve isogenies and proving the chain rule a_{alpha circ beta} = c_alpha * a_beta (Silverman III.5.6a). All proofs are 1-15 lines; the main export omegaPullbackCoeff_comp_of_base is used in GapSpines.lean, GapQfKernel.lean, and AdditionPullback/Differential.lean but is unused within this file itself.
